name: existing-lender-synonym-normalization
rationale: Broker uses 'RBC' (informal) in intake. loan_application doc has 'Royal Bank of Canada'. mortgage_statement doc has 'RBC Royal Bank'. Broker correction uses 'Royal Bank'. F1.EL canonical-map must normalize all four synonyms (RBC / Royal Bank of Canada / RBC Royal Bank / Royal Bank) to a single canonical lender entity per LENDER_SYNONYMS map. Tests synonym-resolution that all variants resolve to same canonical value.
notes: Two-event sequence with 4 lender-name variants across sources. Tests LENDER_SYNONYMS lookup robustness.
